questions.prompt: What title should the structured plan use?
questions.guidance: Initialize the plan section title before invoking planner-chat.

questions.prompt: Summarize the plan scope that planner-chat should expand into WBS rows.
questions.guidance: Ground the summary in synthesized brainstorm scores; do not re-run brainstorming scoring here.

questions.prompt: Invoke planner-chat to author structured plan sections and WBS from the brainstorm synthesis.
questions.guidance: Follow the planner-chat playbook after plan.title and plan.summary are set. Transition to reviewed when rubric review is recorded.

inputs.contextProblem: Validate the Ideas brainstorm workflow with a second test row—session scoring, synthesis, and transition to planning should work end-to-end.
inputs.contextAudience: Workflow Cannon maintainers and agents exercising the ideas module brainstorm flow.
inputs.unknownsNotes: Whether this row is purely a fixture or will accumulate real scope; what the operator meant by the placeholder note 'Details.'
inputs.alternativesConsidered: Do nothing (leave idea open without brainstorm)—deprioritized because the goal is to exercise brainstorm→planning. Manual dashboard scoring—deprioritized because agent-led session is the target flow.
inputs.sessionNotes: Smoke-test brainstorm for I008. Revisit scores if operator replaces placeholder note with real requirements.

plan.title: Test Idea 2
plan.summary: Author structured plan sections from brainstorm synthesis.
